form.formComment: Resumes off a 36 day letup. Last run finished eighth of 9 starters at Warwick on March 8 over 4200m, 48 len behind Mount Anglesby with 72kg at $3.80. Before that tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily finished second of 7 runners at Doncaster on January 23 over 4900m, slow track; 1.0 len behind Mask Of Zorro with 75kg at $2.50. Worth another chance.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after two months finished fifth of 7 runners at Doncaster on March 13 over 4900m, 42 len behind Jakar Du Moulin with 70.5kg at $6.50. Previously second-up came from midfield; finished fifth in a small field at Kempton Park on November 10 over 4200m, 30 len behind Kasino Des Mottes carrying 72.5kg at $13. Fitter for run. Key runner - don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Resuming today after five months. Finished off last preparation winning by 6 len Lingfield November 27 over 4600m defeating Island Run carrying 74kg at $9. Previously first up; 6 of 11 runners at Uttoxeter January 25 2025 over 4010m, 41 len behind Owl Of Athens with 74.5kg at $5.50. Sure to feature on his best form.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after four months finished third in a small field at Ascot on March 29 over 3900m, 31 len behind Gnomon with 70kg at $23. form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after a year finished fifth of 7 starters at Uttoxeter on March 28 over 4000m, 4.5 len behind Looking As You Are carrying 73kg at $6. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Bangor-On-Dee on October 29 2024 over 3900m. Tougher task this time.

form.formComment: Useful type. Last start won by 2 len Southwell on March 24 over 4900m defeating Peckforton Hills carrying 74kg at $29 in a hurdle. Before that ran last in a small field at this track on March 13 over 4000m, 26 len behind Secret Vino with 72.5kg at $8.50. Major player again.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after three months pulled up at Plumpton on April 6 over 5000m. Previously second-up finished fourth of 8 starters at Huntingdon on October 7 over 5000m, 6 len behind Indian Sunbird with 71kg at $5. Needs to go up a notch.
